[console_scripts]
nuitka = nuitka.__main__:main
nuitka-run = nuitka.__main__:main

[distutils.commands]
bdist_nuitka = nuitka.distutils.DistutilsCommands:bdist_nuitka
build_nuitka = nuitka.distutils.DistutilsCommands:build
install_nuitka = nuitka.distutils.DistutilsCommands:install

[distutils.setup_keywords]
build_with_nuitka = nuitka.distutils.DistutilsCommands:setupNuitkaDistutilsCommands
